data.title: BTCC Integrates Futures Trading on TradingView

data.title: ServiceNow Buys Cybersecurity Startup Armis For $7.75Bn
data.description:
ServiceNow has agreed to acquire cybersecurity startup Armis for $7. 75 billion, the companies announced, as it seeks to attract new customers amid growing risks of cyberattacks.
source: https://catenaa.com/industries/technology/servicenow-buys-cybersecurity-startup-armis-for-7-75bn/

data.title: Bybit to Exit Japan in 2026 Over Regulatory Compliance Issues
data.description:
Bybit will cease operations for Japanese residents in 2026 following prolonged regulatory battles with the FSA, which has demanded proper licensing since formal warnings began in 2023.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bybit-to-exit-japan-in-2026-over-regulatory-compliance-issues/

data.title: Arizona Eyes ‘Tax-Free’ Status: New Bill Seeks to Ban Local Crypto Taxes
data.description:
Arizona lawmakers have introduced new bills that would exempt cryptocurrency from taxation and prohibit local governments from taxing blockchain activity across the state.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/arizona-bill-ban-local-crypto-taxes-fees/

data.title: Even Ethereum treasury companies are selling ETH to pay off debt
data.description:
This month, Peter Thiel-backed treasury ETHZilla sold $74. 5M of its ETH holdings to retire some of its bonds.
source: https://protos.com/even-ethereum-treasury-companies-are-selling-eth-to-pay-off-debt/

data.title: XRP Sentiment Has Collapsed — And That May Be the Setup Bulls Are Waiting For
data.description:
XRP price has quietly slipped into an uncomfortable spot. The price is down about 9% over the past 30 days, momentum feels stale, and positive social chatter around the token has turned noticeably sour. At first glance, that looks like weakness. But XRP has a history of doing its best work when enthusiasm disappears
source: https://beincrypto.com/xrp-price-sentiment-problem-solution/

data.title: Bank of Russia Targets 2026 for Strict Crypto Regulation Framework and New Penalties
data.description:
The Bank of Russia plans to establish a comprehensive cryptocurrency regulatory framework by July 2026, introducing legal liability for intermediaries in the digital asset market.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/russia-crypto-regulation-central-bank-2026-deadline/

source: https://zycrypto.com/bitcoin-whales-sold-15-billion-btc-in-2025-as-further-price-correction-expected/

data.title: US Economy Grew Than Expected In Q3 With Consumer Spending
data.description:
US economy grew faster than expected in Q3 by 4. 3%, driven by robust consumer spending, but before the rising cost of living and the recent government shutdown.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/special-reports/us-economy-grew-than-expected-in-q3-with-consumer-spending/
